# Secrets fixture — exercises minimal-level patterns (secrets fire at all levels)
# All values are obviously synthetic: wrong length, test prefixes, ABCDEF sequences.

# AI API keys
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=[REDACTED-ANTHROPIC-KEY]
OPENAI_API_KEY=[REDACTED-OPENAI-KEY]
GROQ_API_KEY=[REDACTED-GROQ-KEY]
HF_TOKEN=[REDACTED-HUGGINGFACE-TOKEN]
REPLICATE_API_KEY=[REDACTED-REPLICATE-KEY]
GOOGLE_API_KEY=[REDACTED-GOOGLE-API]

# Cloud provider credentials
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=[REDACTED-AWS-KEY]
DO_TOKEN=[REDACTED-DO-TOKEN]

# Version control tokens
GITHUB_TOKEN=[REDACTED-GITHUB-TOKEN]
GITLAB_TOKEN=[REDACTED-GITLAB-TOKEN]
CI_JOB_TOKEN=[REDACTED-GITLAB-PIPELINE]

# Generic secrets
Authorization: Bearer [REDACTED-JWT]
Authorization: [REDACTED-BASIC-AUTH]
[REDACTED-PASSWORD]
[REDACTED-PASSWORD]
[REDACTED-PRIVATE-KEY]

# 1Password and Bitwarden
DB_PASSWORD=[REDACTED-1PASSWORD-REF]
[REDACTED-BW-SESSION]

# Innocent context lines that must pass through unchanged
log_level = "debug"
service = "payments-api"
region = "us-east-1"
